alt: Roman Forum ruins of ancient Iader in Zadar with two carved stone capitals showing theatrical-mask reliefs on the ancient stylobate, with a terracotta-roofed Dalmatian residential building behind
description: Roman Forum ruins of Iader (the Roman name for modern Zadar) in the Croatian old town — two carved stone capitals featuring theatrical-mask reliefs on the ancient stylobate, with a Dalmatian residential building (terracotta roof, green shutters) behind. The Forum was the civic heart of Iader from the 1st century BCE; its ruins sit a few blocks from the Adriatic waterfront where the modern Sea Organ installation now stands.
title: The Roman forum remains of Iader, Zadar, Croatia
